meta.title: How To Become a Marine Corps Scout Sniper | Ethan Nagel
meta.description:
Marine Corps Scout Snipers are some of the most elite, lethal warriors in the world. Here’s how you can become one.

Ethan Nagel is a Silver Star and Purple Heart recipient, and he has three combat deployments with the Marine Corps under his belt. Find out more about him and what he’s doing now below.

Read about some of the recent updates to the Marine Corps sniper world: https://www.sandboxx.us/news/the-marine-corps-is-closing-down-its-scout-sniper-platoons/ 

Organizations and pipelines change often in the military. If you’re trying to make a decision on what path to take, make sure you speak with a recruiter and get the most up-to-date information you can.

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews

📱 Check out Ethan’s website and filmmaking career: https://ethannagelfilms.com/ 
Find him on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ethan.nagel.films/ 

Video Chapters:

00:00 – Introduction
00:30 – Boot Camp
02:55 – Infantry School
02:23 – Life in the Infantry
05:48  – Prepping for Indoc
07:56 – Scout Sniper Indoc
08:40 – What Happens If You’re Selected
09:34 – Scout Sniper School
12:59 – Deployments as a Scout Sniper
16:23 – Life After the Scout Snipers
